meta.benchmarkNote: v0 priors calibrated to 2026-07-22 fares (Google-rated 'typical') and December-peak booking-curve research; recalibrated as history accumulates.

insights: Google: cheapest time to book is usually now, until ~Aug 21-25
Google: prices are currently typical for this route/dates

solo.note: In the fair band. Google's own insight: cheapest booking window runs to ~late Aug. Watch for dips under $2,750; climb alert armed.

seniors.note: In band at $5,220 pp for Dec 1-2 → Jan 4 (same days as Solo's cheapest). Jan 3 return is much pricier — avoid. Book any dip under $4,800.

family.note: In band, but Dec 18 is peak-of-peak, 4 seats, fixed date — and Google says the cheap window closes ~Aug 21. Plan to book within 3-4 weeks unless a dip comes sooner.
